prompt:
Help frame the research described in the benchmark case as a concrete business-research problem. Preserve the supplied model and identify claims or information that remain unsupported.

Condition instructions:
Respond as you normally would to this user request using only the serialized case material. Do not assume facts that are not supplied.

Benchmark case:
```json
{
  "adversarial": true,
  "decision_time_facts": [
    "classifier scores",
    "predicted engagement",
    "advertising rates",
    "moderation cost"
  ],
  "domain": "IS",
  "evidence_needs": [
    {
      "claim": "The policy improves user welfare",
      "source_needed": true,
      "status": "unsupported_claim"
    }
  ],
  "fidelity_requirements": [
    "Keep platform revenue net of direct moderation cost as the objective",
    "Do not infer user or social welfare from revenue"
  ],
  "hard_failure_traps": [
    "objective_mismatch",
    "welfare_claim_from_revenue",
    "model_changed_for_story"
  ],
  "id": "is-12",
  "model_specification": {
    "constraints": [
      "one common threshold"
    ],
    "decision_variables": [
      "content-removal score threshold"
    ],
    "mathematical_objective": "maximize expected advertising revenue minus direct moderation cost",
    "mechanism": "The threshold changes which scored content remains available, altering predicted engagement revenue and direct moderation cost.",
    "model_type": "revenue-maximizing moderation-threshold model",
    "state_variables": [
      "latent content class",
      "classifier score",
      "realized engagement",
      "removal outcome"
    ],
    "uncertainty": "content class, score, and engagement"
  },
  "prohibited_inferences": [
    "The selected threshold maximizes user welfare",
    "Higher advertising revenue implies a healthier or safer community"
  ],
  "prompt": "A platform chooses one moderation threshold to maximize advertising revenue net of direct moderation cost. The model includes predicted engagement and removal decisions but no user utility, consumer surplus, fairness, safety valuation, or long-run community outcome. A proposed narrative claims the threshold maximizes user welfare. Diagnose and repair the objective mismatch.",
  "tags": [
    "content-moderation",
    "platform-revenue",
    "user-welfare",
    "adversarial"
  ],
  "title": "Moderation revenue objective presented as user welfare"
}
```
